## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes issue #___)
- [ ] New feature (adds functionality from issue #___)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires version bump)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no feature or behavior change)

## Related Issues

Closes #___ (if applicable)

- Change 1

## Testing

- [ ] Tests added/updated for new functionality
- [ ] All tests pass locally: `deno task test`
- [ ] Integration tests pass: `deno task test:integration`
- [ ] No new console errors or warnings

**Test Results:**
```
Replace with output from: deno task test
```

## Code Quality

- [ ] Linting passes: `deno task lint`
- [ ] Formatting passes: `deno task fmt --check`
- [ ] Type checking passes: `deno task typecheck`
- [ ] No circular dependencies: `deno task check:circular`
- [ ] No console usage issues: `deno task lint:ban-console`
- [ ] No deep import issues: `deno task lint:ban-deep-imports`

## Coverage

- [ ] Coverage maintained at 80%+
- [ ] Critical paths have 100% coverage
- [ ] Run: `deno task test:coverage && deno task coverage:report`

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md updated (if adding module)
- [ ] New public APIs documented with JSDoc
- [ ] Migration guide included (if breaking change)

## Before Submitting

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] No `any` types used (except where necessary)
- [ ] No commented-out code left in
- [ ] All imports use aliases (`@veryfront/*`)
- [ ] No uncommitted changes
- [ ] Commits are clean and descriptive

## Checklist for Reviewers

- [ ] Code implements described changes
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Error messages are helpful
- [ ] Type safety maintained
- [ ] Test coverage adequate
- [ ] Documentation clear and complete
